results.title: EEC adopts EAEU-BRICS cooperation recommendation
results.description: The Board of the Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) adopted a recommendation at its meeting on 19 May to develop trade and economic cooperation between the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU) member states and BRICS countries in agricultural products and food.

results.title: People of a certain age have been sharing the younger generation’s slang terms they’ve totally taken to heart – 15 go-to phrases that aren’t actually that cringe
results.description: Kids these days. AMIRITE? They’re always saying the darnedest things. And it’s almost impossible to understand them because they’re using so many new slang terms it’s like they’ve reinvented language. To get to the bottom of the matter, Redditor u/RainyDaysAndMondays3 asked: ‘Older people using newer slang or phrases, your favourite newer word?’ Lucky for everyone [...] The post People of a certain age have been sharing the younger generation’s slang terms they’ve totally taken to heart – 15 go-to phrases that aren’t actually that cringe appeared first on The Poke .

results.title: Khan Withdraws from Falta Repoll; TMC Alleges Pressure
results.description: Summary: Jahangir Khan, the Trinamool Congress candidate, withdrew his nomination from the Falta constituency in West Bengal on Tuesday, just before the re-polls scheduled for May 21st after the Election Commission’s cancellation of the initial voting. Key Points Jahangir Khan stated that West Bengal chief minister Suvendu Adhikari promised a special package for Falta’s development [...]
